summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Konekt platform features including Guest Orders, Order Tracking, PDF Export, Customer Dashboard, and Order Timeline. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing shows all pages functioning correctly with proper design.

guest_orders_api.create_guest_order: PASS - POST /api/guest/orders creates order with order_number starting with ORD-
guest_orders_api.validation_error: PASS - Returns 422 for missing required fields (customer_email)

order_tracking_api.track_by_id: PASS - GET /api/orders/track/{order_id} returns order with status_history
order_tracking_api.track_by_order_number: PASS - GET /api/orders/track/{order_number} works with order number
order_tracking_api.track_invalid_id: PASS - Returns 404 for invalid ID format

pdf_export_api.export_quote_pdf: PASS - GET /api/admin/pdf/quote/{quote_id} returns valid PDF (3481 bytes, starts with %PDF)

quote_kanban_verification.get_pipeline: PASS - GET /api/admin/quotes/pipeline returns quotes in columns

frontend_checkout_page.empty_cart_state: PASS - /checkout shows empty cart message with Browse Products button
frontend_checkout_page.page_loads: PASS - Page loads correctly with proper styling

frontend_customer_dashboard.quick_cards: PASS - 4 quick access cards displayed (My Orders, My Quotes, My Designs, Invoices)

frontend_order_confirmation.what_happens_next: PASS - What happens next section visible
frontend_order_confirmation.navigation_buttons: PASS - Go to Dashboard and Track Order buttons present

frontend_order_tracking.timeline_component: PASS - Order timeline component with 9 steps visible
frontend_order_tracking.order_details: PASS - Order number, total, status displayed

frontend_quote_kanban.four_columns: PASS - Draft, Sent, Approved, Converted columns displayed
frontend_quote_kanban.quote_cards: PASS - Quote cards displayed in columns
frontend_quote_kanban.pdf_service_update: PASS - Kanban still works after PDF service rewrite

seed_data_creation: Created test guest order for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: Guest checkout flow (POST /api/guest/orders), order tracking (GET /api/orders/track/{id}), PDF export with premium design (GET /api/admin/pdf/quote/{id} and /api/admin/pdf/invoice/{id}), Customer Dashboard, Order Timeline component. Quote Kanban still works after PDF service rewrite.

mocked_apis_list: POST /api/admin/send/quote/{id} - Returns stub success, no actual email sent
POST /api/admin/send/invoice/{id} - Returns stub success, no actual email sent

features_verified: POST /api/guest/orders - Creates guest order without authentication
GET /api/orders/track/{order_id} - Tracks order by ID with status_history
Checkout page (/checkout) - Shows empty cart state correctly
Customer Dashboard (/dashboard) - Shows 4 quick access cards and activity sections
Order Confirmation page (/order-confirmation/:orderId) - Shows success message
Order Tracking page (/orders/:orderId/tracking) - Shows 9-step order timeline
Quote Kanban board still works after PDF service update
